MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Jophn Furstenthal of Furstenthal Law Office (925-284-1718) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Hilary E. Youngblood of Davidovitz + Bennett Law Offices (415-956-4800) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITAL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Plaintiff Tyne Newby-Hurt has submitted sufficient evidence by the expert declaration of Dr. Ko, which creates a triable issues regarding breach of the standard of care and causation. Every objection to Dr. Koh's deposition is overruled. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
